mechanics.excerpt: MECHWARRIOR Jrd EDItIc, SkiLLS In general, Attributes and traits describe what character SUBSKILLS is. By contrast, skills describe what she does. Every character Skills marked on the Skill List (p 59) and in this chapter has set of abilities called skills that together account tor her with an asterisk actually represent groups of related sub- areas of proficiency: It is certain that character will have more skills_ You cannot simply have Technician Skill, for example.
